arts.ttl: AC Milan vs. Lazio, three points for Europe
arts.sum: Milan have avoided defeat in six of their last seven league matches against Lazio (W5 D1), with the Biancocelesti`s only victory in this period coming on 24 January 2023 (4-0 at the Olimpico). Lazio have drawn their last two league matches, last recording more consecutive draws in Serie A in the period between November and December 2018 (a run of four, including a 1-1 draw against Milan on 25 November 2018 at the Olimpico).
